policies.description: Established patients who refer a new patient to the clinic are entitled to a PHP 300 discount on their next visit upon the new patient's first completed appointment. The referring patient must be identified by the new patient at the time of booking.

policies.title: Personal Belongings Policy
policies.description: Patients are advised to leave valuables at home or keep them in their possession at all times. The clinic is not responsible for loss or damage to personal belongings, including mobile phones, wallets, or accessories, while on the clinic premises.

policies.title: Clinic Hygiene and Safety Protocol
policies.description: All clinical staff wear appropriate personal protective equipment including masks, gloves, and protective eyewear during patient care. Patients are requested to sanitize their hands upon entering the clinic.

policies.title: Emergency Appointment Surcharge Policy
policies.description: Emergency dental appointments scheduled outside the regular booking queue are subject to an emergency service fee of PHP 200 to PHP 500 in addition to the standard service cost.

policies.title: Dental Package Deal Policy
policies.description: Bundled dental packages combining multiple services at a reduced total price are available periodically. Package deals are non-transferable to other patients, non-refundable once availed, and must be completed within six months of purchase.

policies.title: Patient Loyalty Program Policy
policies.description: Patients who have visited the clinic for three or more consecutive years are enrolled in our loyalty program. Loyalty members receive priority scheduling, annual check-up discounts, and exclusive access to seasonal promotional packages.

policies.title: Pediatric Behavior Management Policy
policies.description: Our dentists use evidence-based, child-friendly behavior guidance techniques to help young patients cooperate with dental treatment. These include tell-show-do, voice control, and positive reinforcement. Physical restraint is not practiced.

policies.title: Clinical Outcome Monitoring Policy
policies.description: The clinic monitors treatment outcomes through scheduled follow-up visits and periodic reassessment of completed restorations, orthodontic results, and surgical sites. Patients who do not return for scheduled follow-ups will be contacted by the clinic.

policies.title: Language and Communication Assistance Policy
policies.description: Clinical consultations are conducted primarily in Filipino and English. Patients who communicate in a regional dialect are encouraged to bring a companion who can assist with translation if needed. Our staff will make reasonable efforts to ensure clear communication of all treatment information.

policies.title: Appointment Reminder and Confirmation Policy
policies.description: Appointment reminder messages are sent via SMS or Facebook Messenger one day before the scheduled visit. Patients are expected to confirm or reschedule upon receiving the reminder. Unconfirmed appointments may be released to other patients on a waiting list, particularly for high-demand time slots.

policies.title: Multi-Branch Patient Records Policy
policies.description: Patient records from one branch of the clinic may be accessed by another branch to ensure continuity of care. Patients must consent to inter-branch record sharing at registration. Records are transferred securely and only to authorized clinic staff.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Maria Santos
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Maria Santos is a licensed general dentist with over 10 years of clinical experience in comprehensive oral care. She handles routine check-ups, oral prophylaxis, tooth extractions, and composite fillings.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Jose Reyes
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Jose Reyes is a licensed orthodontic specialist with extensive experience in metal braces, ceramic braces, and retainer management.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Ana Lim
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Ana Lim specializes in root canal treatments and the management of pulp-related dental diseases. She uses modern rotary endodontic instruments to ensure efficient and comfortable procedures. Dr. Lim also handles complex extractions and urgent dental pain cases.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Carlo Mendoza
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Carlo Mendoza is an oral and maxillofacial surgeon specializing in surgical extractions, impacted wisdom tooth removal, implant placement, and jaw-related procedures. He is trained in administering local anesthesia and managing surgical complications.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Patricia Cruz
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Patricia Cruz is a periodontist who focuses on the prevention, diagnosis, and treatment of gum diseases. She performs scaling and root planing, gum surgery, and periodontal maintenance. She also handles dental implant placement in coordination with the restorative team.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Ramon Dela Cruz
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Ramon Dela Cruz specializes in the restoration and replacement of teeth, including dental crowns, bridges, veneers, complete and partial dentures, and implant-supported restorations. He works closely with dental laboratories to deliver precise and aesthetically pleasing prosthetic outcomes.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Sofia Garcia
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Sofia Garcia specializes in dental care for infants, children, and adolescents. She provides preventive services such as fluoride treatments and sealants, as well as restorative treatments including fillings and stainless steel crowns.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Miguel Tan
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Miguel Tan has a strong focus on smile enhancement procedures including in-clinic teeth whitening, composite and porcelain veneers, and smile makeover planning. He combines clinical expertise with an eye for aesthetics to deliver natural-looking, transformative results.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Rosario Bautista
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Rosario Bautista is a seasoned general dentist who handles routine dental care including check-ups, fillings, extractions, and dentures. She has a special interest in geriatric dentistry and provides compassionate care to elderly patients with complex dental needs.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Kevin Fernandez
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Kevin Fernandez is an associate orthodontist assisting with braces adjustments, retainer fittings, and clear aligner monitoring. He trained under Dr. Reyes and is familiar with a range of orthodontic appliances.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Maribel Navarro
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Maribel Navarro is a senior periodontist with over 15 years of experience in the diagnosis and management of gum diseases. She performs advanced periodontal surgeries including flap procedures, bone regeneration, and soft tissue grafts.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Emmanuel Santos
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Emmanuel Santos specializes in the diagnosis and non-surgical management of oral mucosal conditions including recurrent mouth ulcers, oral lichen planus, burning mouth syndrome, and salivary gland disorders.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Christine Go
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Christine Go is a cosmetic dentistry associate who assists with smile design consultations, composite veneers, bonding, and teeth whitening. She collaborates closely with Dr.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Adrian Villanueva
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Adrian Villanueva is a dental implantologist with specialized training in implant placement, bone grafting, socket preservation, and implant prosthetics.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Luisa Castillo
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Luisa Castillo is a part-time general dentist available on select weekdays and Saturdays. She handles check-ups, fillings, extractions, and referrals for more specialized care.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Ryan Ong
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Ryan Ong is an associate oral surgeon who assists with surgical extractions, minor soft tissue surgeries, and post-operative management. He provides coverage during Dr.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Diana Torres
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Diana Torres is an orthodontist with a focus on clear aligner therapy and early orthodontic intervention in pediatric patients.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Felix Aquino
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Felix Aquino is an associate pediatric dentist specializing in dental care for children from infancy through early adolescence.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Veronica Luna
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Veronica Luna is a senior prosthodontist with deep expertise in full mouth rehabilitation, implant-supported prosthetics, and all-on-4 treatment planning. She oversees complex restorative cases and ensures precision and aesthetics in the delivery of crowns, bridges, and full-arch dentures.

dentistProfiles.name: Dr. Bernard Chua
dentistProfiles.bio: Dr. Bernard Chua is an associate endodontist who handles root canal treatments, retreatments, and post-treatment management. He works alongside Dr. Lim on complex cases involving calcified canals, curved roots, and retreatment of previously filled teeth.
